Labour Rates - Daily Rates
To Services of Driver/Technician per 10hr Cont. Day (call to Wrap)
Overtime Charged @ 1.5T  (Inc. Pre-Calls & Call Times Prior to 07:00)
Sunday and Bank Holiday Work charged at Double Time
Turnaround Day After Night Work Chargeable from 23:59
Supplementary charge for Late Working between 22:00 & 23:59
Supplementary charge applies for Saturday working
Commercials - Sundays, Night Work charged at 2T /  Saturday Charged 1.5T - APA

Tracking Vehicle and Crew Travel Days

Congestion Charge/Clean air zone charge where applicable
Travel Meal Allowance per man per day
Hotel Per Man Per Room
Overnight Meal Allowance per man per night
Breakfast/Lunch not Supplied on location per man
Recce Travel Time/Travel Day (When recce is outside the London area)
Recce Mileage (Inc On Location Recce Mileage, Location to Location Moves)
